item.title: Markets Rally, But Studds Accessories Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Studds Accessories Ltd’s share price has declined to a fresh 52-week low, closing near ₹436 on 15 May 2026, reflecting ongoing pressures within the diversified consumer products sector and broader market weakness. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Atal Realtech Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 28.00
item.description: With a remarkable 92.48% gain over the past year, Atal Realtech Ltd has surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 28.00 on 15 May 2026, outpacing the Sensex which declined by 8.84% during the same period. This milestone reflects a sustained momentum driven by a confluence of technical indicators aligning favourably across multiple timeframes. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Slip Amid Sector Divergence; Media Shines While Metals Falter
item.description: Indian equity benchmarks closed lower on 15 May 2026, with the Sensex retreating 160.73 points (-0.21%) to 75,237.99 and the Nifty shedding 46.1 points (-0.19%) to finish at 23,643.50. Market breadth remained weak as declines outpaced advances across the BSE500, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid mixed sectoral trends and subdued global cues. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Mild Correction Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends and Weak Breadth
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a modest decline of 0.37% today, extending a recent downtrend that has seen the index fall by 2.88% over the past five trading sessions. Despite this overall weakness, select stocks within the segment have delivered notable returns, underscoring the mixed nature of the market environment for smaller companies. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Modest Decline Amid Mixed Stock Performances
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index experienced a modest decline of 0.48% on 15 May 2026, continuing a downward trend over the past week with a 1.41% fall. Despite this, select stocks within the segment delivered notable returns, underscoring a mixed performance across sectors and individual companies. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Mixed Performance Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a modest decline over recent sessions, reflecting a cautious market mood. Despite pockets of strength in select heavyweight stocks, the overall trend has been weighed down by a greater number of decliners, signalling a nuanced interplay between defensive and cyclical sectors. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Lodha Developers Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 15 May 2026
item.description: Lodha Developers Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 845.1, reflecting a 3.19% drop as the stock faced sustained selling pressure amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: KFin Technologies Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 805.5 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the sixth consecutive session, KFin Technologies Ltd has closed lower, culminating in a fresh 52-week low of Rs 805.5 on 15 May 2026. This marks a 12.99% decline over the past six days, underscoring a sustained sell-off that has pushed the stock well below its key moving averages. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kotyark Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 452
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 450, Kotyark Industries Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high of Rs 452 on 15 May 2026, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This surge comes after a sustained seven-day rally that has delivered over 10% returns, underscoring the stock’s robust technical positioning amid a mixed broader market backdrop. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Vijaya Diagnostic Centre Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1376.25
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Vijaya Diagnostic Centre Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 1376.25 on 15 May 2026, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This rally has been underpinned by a confluence of technical indicators aligning favourably, even as the broader market showed signs of weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Dalmia Bharat Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 1721 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the third consecutive session, Dalmia Bharat Ltd has seen its share price decline, culminating in a fresh 52-week low of Rs 1721 on 15 May 2026. This drop extends the stock’s underperformance amid a broader market that itself is struggling, but where the divergence between the company’s financials and share price is particularly notable. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Julien Agro Infratech Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Julien Agro Infratech Ltd’s share price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.1.4 on 15 May 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting persistent pressures on its valuation and market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts P. H. Capital Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 768
item.description: Surging to an all-time high of Rs 768 on 15 May 2026, P. H. Capital Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outperforming its sector and the broader market with a 287.49% gain over the past year. This milestone reflects a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained upward price action despite a subdued market backdrop. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: United Breweries Ltd. Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 1362 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, United Breweries Ltd. closed lower, slipping to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 1362 on 15 May 2026. This marks a significant 36.2% decline from its 52-week high of Rs 2133.45, underscoring persistent selling pressure despite some pockets of strength in the broader market. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Shares of Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd experienced significant intraday weakness on 15 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 102.6, down 7.32% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting immediate selling pressure and subdued market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Adani Green Energy Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 15 May 2026
item.description: Adani Green Energy Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 15 Jun 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,372.75, reflecting a 3.04% drop from its previous close. Despite opening with a gap up and reaching a fresh 52-week high of Rs 1,472.3, the stock succumbed to selling pressure, underperforming its sector and broader market indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Dr Reddys Laboratories Ltd Surges 3.05% to Day's High of Rs 1338.5 — Outperforms Sector by 2.23 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex slipped 0.16% on 15 Jun 2026 while Dr Reddys Laboratories Ltd gained 3.05%, outperforming its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector by 2.23 percentage points. This notable single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Ratnamani Metals & Tubes Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Ratnamani Metals & Tubes Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 15 Jun 2026, with the stock touching a low of Rs 2,680, marking a 7.26% drop from its previous close. This underperformance came amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures, reflecting immediate selling interest and subdued market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: PNB Gilts Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 15 May 2026
item.description: Shares of PNB Gilts Ltd, a small-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, declined sharply today, hitting an intraday low of Rs 74.83, down 6.93% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid heightened volatility and negative market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Magnus Steel Leads Exceptional Half-Year Returns with Over 1000% Gain
item.description: Magnus Steel has delivered an extraordinary return of 1015.93% over the past six months, outpacing its micro cap peers and the broader market by a significant margin. This remarkable performance highlights the stock’s strong technical and financial fundamentals, despite its expensive valuation, positioning it as a standout in the Other Electrical Equipment sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
